title: fumaria macrocarpa subsp. macrocarpa
intro: Fumaria macrocarpa subsp. macrocarpa, also known as large fumitory, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the fumitory family, Fumariaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally employed to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving kidney function, and aiding in the treatment of urinary tract infections. Large fumitory can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, with the tea being one of the most common herbal preparations.
